query: Our checkout page takes 4.2 seconds to load. Make it faster.
expected_behavior: Captures baseline metrics before recommending any optimization (LCP, TTFB, waterfall)
Classifies the problem type: structural (N+1 queries, blocking API calls) or syntax-level
Identifies the critical path: what is the longest sequential chain of work before LCP?
Does not recommend 'add lazy loading' as the first action without profiling
Produces a prioritized list of optimizations starting with the structural bottleneck
